subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath sent down His verses and manifested His clear tokens and caused all things to speak forth that there is none other God but Him, the One, the Peerless, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل ایاته و اظهر بیناته و انطق الاشیاء علی انه لا اله الا هو الفرد الواحد العلیم الحکیم
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @eulogies; reminiscences, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement
